title: T-022 — UI: RPT-010 Rules Usage Analytics (/reporting/rules-usage) admin-only (12-REPORTING §15.1 RPT-010)
prompt:
# T-022 — RPT-010 Rules Usage Analytics UI (admin-only)

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1 RPT-010, §4.1 #10, §11 V-RPT-REFRESH
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/admin-screens.jsx:147-283 (`rpt_rules_usage`)
UX: prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:586-626

## Goal
Server Component admin-only page rendering: rules list with expandable rows showing input/output JSON schema + recent audit log (5 rows allow/deny badges), eval latency trend chart (7-day, 50ms target), orphan-rule alert (never evaluated), per-rule eval count + trigger rate columns. Consumer of 02-SETTINGS rule_evaluations audit via T-014 mv_rules_usage MV.

## Prototype parity
- Source: `admin-screens.jsx:147-283`
- Translation: role !== 'Admin' early return → middleware T-009; RPT_RU_RULES → T-014 rules-usage helper; pre-formatted JSON → shadcn ScrollArea; ChartLine eval latency → Recharts LineChart w/ 50ms ReferenceLine.

## Implementation contract
1. Page is admin-route; middleware enforces role + `rpt.rules_usage.read` permission.
2. RSC reads T-014 getRulesUsage + audit log subset (PII-redacted server-side).
3. Expandable rows via TanStack Table row expansion; inner Collapsible content shows input/output schema + recent audit table.
4. Orphan rule alert: server computes `WHERE last_fired IS NULL AND phase='P1'`; shown as shadcn Alert variant='warning'.
5. Empty / loading / error / permission states; RTL + Playwright parity.
6. next-intl `reporting.rules_usage.*` keys.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/rules-usage/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/rules-usage/_components/rules-usage-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/rules-usage/__tests__/rules-usage.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-rules-usage.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a non-admin user requests /reporting/rules-usage, when middleware T-009 runs, then 403 + audit row; non-admin sees /403.
2. Given admin user accesses page with 5 P1 rules and 1 orphan rule, when it renders, then table shows 5 rows + orphan-rule warning alert at top.
3. Given a row is expanded, when expansion fires, then Collapsible content shows input/output JSON schema in ScrollArea + recent audit mini-table (max 5 rows) with allow/deny badges.
4. Given audit log row contains user_id, when serialised to client, then user_id is redacted/hashed server-side (PII redaction per translation-notes).
5. Given latency trend chart renders, when inspected, then ReferenceLine at 50ms appears + 7-day x-axis.
6. UI parity + 4 states + next-intl wrapping.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL covers admin-only guard + expansion + PII redaction + orphan alert + latency chart.
- Playwright parity.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test rules-usage && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-rules-usage`.
- GREEN: build page + client + Collapsible expansion.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip PII redaction of user_id in audit log JSON sent to client.
- Do not rely on client-side role check — middleware T-009 only.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip 4 states.
- Do not let JSON schema preview enable mutation — read-only Admin view only.
